headline: Incyte Announces New Positive Data at EHA 2026 Showed INCA033989 Achieved Rapid, Robust and Sustained Clinical and Molecular Responses and Was Well Tolerated in Patients with Myelofibrosis and Essential Thrombocythemia
summary: WILMINGTON, Del., June 13, 2026--New Positive Data Showed INCA033989 Achieved Rapid, Robust & Sustained Clinical & Molecular Responses and Was Well Tolerated in Patients with MF & ET

headline: Results from Incyte’s Pivotal Phase 3 frontMIND Trial of Tafasitamab (Monjuvi®/Minjuvi®) Combination Presented at the 2026 European Hematology Association (EHA) Congress Plenary Showed Prolonged Progression Free Survival
summary: WILMINGTON, Del., June 13, 2026--Results from Incyte’s frontMIND Trial of Tafasitamab (Monjuvi/Minjuvi) Combination at the 2026 EHA Plenary Showed Prolonged Progression Free Survival
